backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores per-user analysis records in a map, exposing `saveAnalysis` and `getAnalysisHistory` query/update calls gated behind access-control permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs for the MarketIntel AI application.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used across the application.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles Internet Identity auth gating, tab navigation between Dashboard and History views, asset/timeframe state, analysis generation, and backend save integration.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisCard.tsx: Displays a single analysis record with trend, RSI status, support/resistance levels, a color-coded risk badge, and AI summary text, supporting both full and compact display modes.
frontend/src/components/AssetSelector.ts: Renders a shadcn Select dropdown for BTC/ETH/SOL asset selection and three timeframe toggle buttons (1H/4H/1D) with active-state highlighting.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a sticky footer with a financial disclaimer and a caffeine.ai attribution link, using the current hostname as a UTM parameter.
frontend/src/components/HistoryTab.tsx: Displays a scrollable list of past analysis records fetched via React Query, with collapsible rows showing asset, timeframe, trend, risk badge, timestamp, and an expanded AnalysisCard.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Full-page login screen that shows app branding, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity authentication button with loading and toggle-logout logic.
frontend/src/components/TopBar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar displaying the app logo, a live badge, a truncated principal ID, and a logout button that clears the identity and React Query cache.
frontend/src/components/TradingViewChart: Embeds a TradingView chart widget for BTC/ETH/SOL with RSI and MACD studies, dynamically loading the TV script and re-initializing the widget on asset or timeframe changes, with a fallback UI on script failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout state, and persisted delegation identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports useGetAnalysisHistory (React Query fetch of analysis history from the backend actor) and useSaveAnalysis (mutation to save a record and invalidate the history cache).
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark fintech theme using OKLCH CSS custom properties along with utility classes for glows, card surfaces, text gradients, and custom scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/analysisGenerator.ts: Generates deterministic, seeded pseudo-random crypto market analysis data (price, trend, RSI, support/resistance levels, risk level, and summary text) for a given asset and timeframe, changing daily but consistent within a session.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the theme with OKLCH-based custom color tokens, fintech-specific palette (electric blue, charcoal, risk colors), custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing MarketIntel AI's architecture, existing features, known issues, and image requirements for a dark-themed ICP-hosted crypto dashboard with Internet Identity auth and Motoko backend.
